steps.title: Set the output equal
steps.content:
The question asks for the input $x$ that makes $g(x)=236$. Since $g(x)=\frac{x}{2}$, set the expression equal to $236$.
$$\frac{x}{2}=236$$

steps.title: Undo the division
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by $2$ to isolate $x$.
$$x=236\cdot2=472$$
The answer is 472.
